name: Troubleshooting Methodology
description: Structured approach to troubleshooting any issue

phase_1_observe.name: Observe & Collect
steps: What is the exact error message or symptom?
Is it reproducible? (always, intermittent, specific conditions)
Check resource utilization (CPU, memory, disk, network)

phase_2_hypothesize.name: Hypothesize
steps: Start with the most likely + easiest to verify

phase_3_test.name: Test & Validate
steps: Test one hypothesis at a time
Use the simplest test that can confirm or eliminate
If eliminated: move to next hypothesis
If all eliminated: expand hypothesis list

phase_4_fix.name: Fix & Verify
steps: Apply the minimal fix that resolves the issue
Verify the fix resolves the symptom

phase_5_learn.name: Learn & Prevent
steps: Identify what would have prevented the issue
Create follow-up tasks (monitoring, alerts, tests, code fixes)
